articles.headline: Super Typhoon Sinlaku could bring significant impacts to US islands in Pacific Ocean
articles.description: Super Typhoon Sinlaku is forecast to track close to Guam and potentially bring significant impacts to the Northern Mariana Islands over the coming days.

articles.headline: I’m More Than a Bit Worried About the Typhoon That’s About to Hit a Group of U.S. Islands
articles.description: Though the islands have scandal-ridden pasts, climate change doesn’t distinguish between exploited workers and crooked government officials.

articles.headline: Strongest storm on planet bearing down on U.S. islands in Western Pacific - San Francisco Chronicle
